title: Missing #include <zephyr/sys/util.h> for BUILD_ASSERT in link.h
description: The BUILD_ASSERT for LICHEN_TDMA_Slot size requires zephyr/sys/util.h which is not included in link.h. This will cause compile error. Add it after std includes. Also guard struct with #ifdef CONFIG_LICHEN_TDMA per Kconfig.
close_reason: Added include for zephyr/sys/util.h, guarded struct with CONFIG_LICHEN_TDMA, reordered fields to uint8_t[8] for ARM alignment, sizeof now 20 with padding. 3 review passes complete with no remaining issues.
